meta.title: Dário Soares - Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Dário Soares - Full Stack Developer specialized in React, TypeScript and modern web development

about.title: Hello, my name is Dário Soares.
about.role: My mission is to build web solutions focused on performance and usability, ensuring a dynamic and impactful product in every line of code.
about.description: I am a Full Stack Developer driven by the desire to transform complex challenges into simple, fast, and scalable digital applications. My passion for technology extends from the visual conception of interfaces to robust backend architecture. I am dedicated to structuring modular, clean, and secure code, always balancing the best design with solid engineering. My main focus is ensuring that businesses find the perfect bridge to their technological growth in my solutions.
about.problemText: Businesses lose money with slow systems, confusing interfaces, and manual processes. I build fast, intuitive, and automated applications that increase conversion and save time.

meta.title: About | Dário Soares

service1.title: Web Development
service1.description: Creation of modern, responsive and performance-optimized websites and web applications using React, TypeScript and market best practices.

service2.title: Frontend Development
service2.description: Development of intuitive and attractive user interfaces, with a focus on user experience and responsive design for all devices.

service3.title: Technical Consulting
service3.description: Advice on software architecture, technology selection and development best practices for web projects of any scale.

contact.subtitle: Get in touch
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to work together? Drop me an email — I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.emailDescription: Best way to reach me. I typically reply within 24 hours.

project1.title: Biblioteca ISLA Gaia
project1.description: Web application for school library management, allowing loan and return management of books, title search and user management.

project2.title: Arte em Ponto Ecommerce
project2.description: E-commerce platform for selling unique crochet creations, with shopping cart functionality, secure payment and inventory management.

project3.title: Junta de Freguesia de Sermonde
project3.description: Institutional website for Junta de Freguesia de Sermonde, with information about services, events and contacts.

project4.title: Oxlyn Software
project4.description: Development studio specialized in scripts and resources for FiveM servers. Our products empower server owners to build unique roleplay experiences, featuring custom job systems, economies, inventories, and mechanics tailored to their communities

meta.title: Experience | Dário Soares
meta.description: Professional experience of Dário Soares - Full Stack Developer

item1.description: Developing full stack web applications for clients, from concept to deployment. Building responsive interfaces with React and TypeScript, RESTful APIs with Node.js, and database integrations. Delivering scalable and maintainable solutions tailored to each client's needs.

item2.description: Built and shipped multiple personal web projects to sharpen frontend skills. Focused on React component architecture, CSS animations, and responsive design. Explored modern tooling including Vite, TypeScript and design systems.

item3.description: Laid the foundation in web development through structured study and hands-on training. Covered HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP and introductory backend concepts. Completed projects that bridged academic learning with real-world application.
